SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class Recognizer

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
public class Recognizer extends Object
Recognizes drawn gestures by comparing the player's stroke to a set of shape templates. This class is based on an existing gesture-recognition implementation from GitHub. I modified it for this project by limiting/enabling specific shapes and connecting the recognizer to the game's shape system, as well as optimizing some parts. Original source: https://github.com/olwal/dollar

  • Constructor Details

    • Recognizer

      public Recognizer()

    • Recognizer

      public Recognizer(boolean circle, boolean upsideDownV, boolean normalV, boolean horizontalLine, boolean verticalLine)
      Constructs a recognizer with only the currently needed shape templates enabled.
      Parameters:
      circle - whether circle gestures should be recognized
      upsideDownV - whether upside-down V gestures should be recognized
      normalV - whether normal V gestures should be recognized
      horizontalLine - whether horizontal line gestures should be recognized
      verticalLine - whether vertical line gestures should be recognized

    • Recognizer

      public Recognizer(int gestureSet)

    • Recognize

      public Result Recognize(Vector points)
      Attempts to recognize the given stroke as one of the enabled shapes.
      Parameters:
      points - the points drawn by the player
      Returns:
      the recognition result, or null if no shape is confidently recognized

    • AddTemplate

      int AddTemplate(String name, Vector points)
